use_cases: Previewing article thumbnails or link destinations before clicking
Showing product images on hover for e-commerce link listings
Displaying rich link previews in documentation or wikis
Enhancing blog posts or news sites with hover-based content previews
Adding interactive link previews to dashboard navigation menus
ai_summary: A hover-based link preview component that displays a floating image preview above links with smooth spring animations. The preview follows the cursor position and applies a subtle rotation effect based on horizontal mouse movement for a dynamic, interactive feel. Built with framer-motion for natural motion physics.
